content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 3 (C:3). Looking at the molecular structure:

Atom C:3 (carbon with index 3) is covalently connected to:
- C:4 (carbon atom with index 4)
- C:8 (carbon atom with index 8)
- N:2 (nitrogen atom with index 2)

These three atoms are directly bonded to C:3 as shown by the connecting bonds in the image.

Regarding the geomconf_index, from the file names in the working directory, I can see "geomconf_5733.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 5733.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 3 are:
- Atom index 4, element C
- Atom index 8, element C  
- Atom index 2, element N

Geomconf_index: 5733

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 3, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
